reviews.comment:
Una atencion de maravilla de toda su gente, pasamos la noche y la verdad que muy lindo todo... Salvo la foto de la chica del shampoo y crema enjuague...jajajaja tema que no viene al caso...
Pero todo lo demas muy bueno!

(Translated by Google)
Wonderful service from everyone. We spent the night there, and everything was really nice... except for the photo of the girl with the shampoo and conditioner... hahaha, which is irrelevant...
But everything else was great!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURacmFhREVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena ubicación en la ruta!
Descansar para seguir viaje en un lugar super cómodo.
Recomendable!!!

(Translated by Google)
Great location on the route!
Rest before continuing your journey in a super comfortable place.
Recommended!!!

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, demoras habituales por ser un ACA pero atienden mejor que en la YPF de Rio Colorado. Y el shop es un FUll, que está muy bueno.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, with typical delays due to being an ACA, but they provide better service than at the YPF in Rio Colorado. And the shop is a FUll, which is very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaaWMyRFJREAE

reviews.comment:
